scenes.description: 视频开始，一位身穿深色上衣的人物在安静地操作小型设备或工具，环境为温馨的室内空间，背景有模糊的家具轮廓，光线柔和，氛围专注而平静。
scenes.video_prompt: A man in a dark-colored top stands focused on repairing a small electronic device at a wooden table. Soft natural light enters from the left, casting gentle shadows. The background features a warm-toned wall with faint outlines of shelves and household items. Close-up shot emphasizes hand movements and tool details. Camera slowly pushes in to highlight concentration. Warm color grading, realistic texture, shallow depth of field. Shot on 4K digital cinema camera, 24fps, f/2.8 aperture.

style_elements.characters: Man in dark clothing, focused expression, precise hand movements
style_elements.environment: Indoor domestic setting, warm lighting, simple furniture
style_elements.visual_style: Warm tones, soft lighting, realistic textures, cinematic look
style_elements.camera_movement: Slow push-in towards hands and device

scenes.description: 场景切换至另一室内空间，两位身穿深色衣物的人物正在交谈，背景明亮简洁，右侧光源照亮主要人物，氛围平静但略带神秘。
scenes.video_prompt: Two individuals in dark attire face each other in a softly lit interior. One stands centrally, slightly right, speaking calmly; the other is partially visible on the left, engaged in conversation. The room has light gray walls and subtle furniture hints—table edge, chair back—suggesting a home or office. Side lighting from the right illuminates facial features gently. Medium two-shot with slight dolly out to emphasize interaction. Natural skin tones, muted contrast, serene mood. Filmed with 35mm lens, 4K resolution, 24fps, ISO 400.

style_elements.characters: Two people in dark clothes, mid-conversation, calm demeanor
style_elements.environment: Minimalist indoor space, light-colored walls, subtle furnishings
style_elements.visual_style: Soft lighting, neutral palette, realistic rendering
style_elements.camera_movement: Slight dolly out for emotional distance

scenes.description: 音频叙述拖拉机陷入泥潭，角色们尝试脱困。画面应表现一辆拖拉机陷在深泥中，小动物角色（如小兔子、小绵羊）在旁焦急讨论，天空阴沉，泥泞地面反光。
scenes.video_prompt: An animated rural scene showing a small tractor stuck in thick mud under overcast skies. A cartoon rabbit and sheep stand nearby, gesturing worriedly. Mud splashes around wheels, reflecting dull light. Wide-angle static shot captures entire vehicle and characters. Earthy browns and grays dominate, with subtle motion blur on trembling grass. Gentle wind rustles ears and fur. Over-the-shoulder angles alternate between characters during dialogue. Stylized 3D animation, soft shading, Pixar-like expressiveness. Rendered in 4K, 25fps, wide dynamic range.

style_elements.characters: Anthropomorphic animals: rabbit, sheep, expressive faces
style_elements.environment: Muddy countryside road, overcast sky, wet terrain
style_elements.visual_style: Stylized 3D animation, soft textures, expressive lighting
style_elements.camera_movement: Static wide shot, alternating over-the-shoulder close-ups

scenes.description: 小胡找到了他发明的吸尘器，准备用来清理泥浆。画面展示一个自制的大型真空装置，外观奇特但功能明确，周围散落工具零件。
scenes.video_prompt: Close-up of a quirky, homemade vacuum cleaner being lifted by a bear character named Xiao Hu. The device has mismatched parts—hoses, metal cans, wires—and sits amid scattered tools on muddy ground. Camera tracks laterally as he carries it toward the stuck tractor. Background shows anxious rabbit and sheep watching. Warm highlights contrast cool ambient tones. Slight Dutch angle adds playful tension. Detailed textures on rusted metal and rubber hoses. Animated 3D style with exaggerated proportions. Shot sequence: tracking side move, then medium static setup near tractor.

style_elements.environment: Outdoor muddy field, scattered tools, broken parts
style_elements.camera_movement: Lateral tracking shot followed by static medium frame

scenes.description: 吸尘器连接到拖拉机电池并启动，开始吸取泥浆。镜头聚焦机器运作细节及角色们的期待表情。
scenes.video_prompt: The vacuum cleaner hums to life, plugged into the tractor’s battery. Mud slurps upward through a transparent hose. Close-ups show spinning fans inside glass chambers. Characters gather around—rabbit eyes wide, sheep smiling nervously. Camera circles the group in a slow 360-degree arc, capturing reactions and suction progress. Splatter particles fly subtly. Lighting brightens slightly as mud clears. Realistic fluid simulation blended with cartoon physics. High-speed capture for droplet effects. Style: hybrid realism-cartoon, vibrant yet grounded. Resolution: 4K, shutter speed 1/1000s for crisp action.

style_elements.characters: Group of animal characters observing, hopeful expressions
style_elements.environment: Partially cleared mud pit, active machinery

scenes.description: 泥浆被吸干后，小熊推车成功使拖拉机脱困。镜头从低角度展现推动过程，轮胎缓缓转动驶出泥坑。
scenes.video_prompt: Low-angle shot captures Bear pushing the rear of the tractor as wheels begin to turn. Mud-free ground appears beneath. Tires grip soil, slowly lifting forward. Dust puffs rise lightly. Rabbit cheers off-screen. Camera tilts up as tractor emerges fully, symbolizing triumph. Golden-hour lighting filters through trees. Slow-motion effect (120fps) enhances effort and release. Facial close-ups show relief and joy. Warm color ramp intensifies success tone. Rendered in stylized 3D with soft bloom and lens flare. Sound-sync visual cues emphasize mechanical motion.

style_elements.environment: Cleared muddy path, transitioning to dry land
style_elements.visual_style: Stylized 3D with golden-hour warmth and slow-motion detail

scenes.description: 拖拉机脱困后继续前行，前往送甘草。镜头跟随车辆行驶在乡间小路上，风景优美，阳光渐明。
scenes.video_prompt: Tractor drives down a winding country path flanked by wildflowers and tall grass. Sunlight breaks through clouds, casting dappled shadows. Tracking shot follows from behind at ground level, rising smoothly into aerial drone view. Green fields stretch into the distance. Characters wave from cabin. Vibrant colors return—greens, yellows, blues—contrasting earlier gloom. Gentle breeze animates vegetation. Smooth camera glide with parallax layers. Cinematic aspect ratio 2.35:1. Rendered in high-frame-rate 3D animation, ideal for motion flow.

style_elements.characters: Crew inside tractor, waving, relaxed posture
style_elements.environment: Sunny countryside, blooming meadows, dirt road
style_elements.visual_style: Bright, saturated colors, cinematic landscape framing
style_elements.camera_movement: Ground-to-aerial tracking transition with smooth rise

scenes.description: 到达目的地，小动物们迎接甘草。一群饥饿的小羊围上来吃草，画面充满温情与满足感。
scenes.video_prompt: A flock of cartoon lambs rushes toward the arriving tractor, bleating excitedly. Hay bales are unloaded by rabbit and bear. Close-ups show eager mouths munching fresh grass. Soft focus background with sunlit pasture. Warm backlight creates glowing halos around wool. Children's laughter audio-cued in visuals. Camera uses handheld-style sway for authenticity. Shallow depth isolates feeding moments. Color palette rich in greens and golds. Animation style remains consistent—expressive eyes, bouncy motions. Frame rate: 24fps with motion blur for naturalism.

style_elements.characters: Lambs eating eagerly, crew unloading hay
style_elements.environment: Pasture field, sunny afternoon, rustic farm setting
style_elements.visual_style: Warm backlighting, soft focus, joyful atmosphere
style_elements.camera_movement: Handheld-style sway with selective shallow focus

scenes.description: 大家庆祝成功送达，一起跳舞欢庆。角色们手拉手围圈跳舞，音乐欢快，气氛热烈。
scenes.video_prompt: Characters form a circle—bear, rabbit, sheep, lambs—dancing joyfully in open field. Arms linked, hopping rhythmically to upbeat music. Wide overhead drone shot reveals choreography pattern. Confetti-like flower petals fall gently. Bright daylight, vivid saturation, dynamic shadows. Camera spirals down from top to eye level during dance. Smiles wide, eyes sparkling. Motion trails enhance energy. Stylized animation with squash-and-stretch exaggeration. Lens: 24mm equivalent, fast shutter for crisp limb movement.

style_elements.characters: Group dancing, linked arms, joyful expressions
style_elements.environment: Open meadow, festive atmosphere, petal fall
style_elements.visual_style: Vibrant colors, dynamic motion, exaggerated animation
style_elements.camera_movement: Overhead spiral descent into eye-level celebration

scenes.description: 庆祝达到高潮，所有人齐声欢呼。镜头拉远展现全景，夕阳映照整个农场，温暖宁静。
scenes.video_prompt: Wide panoramic view of the farm at sunset. All characters raise hands in victory, silhouetted against orange-pink sky. Long shadows stretch across fields. Tractor parked nearby, now clean and proud. Camera slowly pulls back and rises into final establishing shot. Ambient glow bathes the scene in warmth. Birds fly homeward in distance. Peaceful score swells. Final frame holds 3 seconds. Ultra-high-resolution render, HDR grading, cinematic fade-out. Style: emotionally resonant closure with nature harmony.

style_elements.characters: Entire cast cheering, united in triumph
style_elements.environment: Sunset farm landscape, peaceful rural setting
style_elements.camera_movement: Slow pull-back and rise to panoramic conclusion

scenes.description: 片尾字幕与彩蛋：出现日文问候语，可能暗示国际友谊或多元文化主题，画面渐暗至黑屏。
scenes.video_prompt: Screen fades in with Japanese text: '皆さんなかな' centered in white serif font. Background is soft gradient from dusk blue to black. Subtle sparkle effects animate around letters. Voiceover whispers phrase gently. Camera holds still in solemn reverence. After 5 seconds, text dissolves slowly. Fade to black over 8 seconds. Audio lingers with ambient chime. Minimalist design, typographic elegance. Intended as cultural nod or post-credits message. Rendered in 4K matte finish, no motion blur, pure clarity.

style_elements.visual_style: Minimalist typography, elegant fade, ambient sparkle
